title: Things to Change
description: Reflect on daily habits, possessions, and attachments; set time horizons and steps toward simplicity; and write about money, work, time, shopping, and community.

title: Budgeting / Money Audit
description: Track what comes in and what you spend; reflect on your financial life with guided questions; plan for living on 90%, 80%, or 50% of current income.

title: Time Sheet
description: Log your daily activities for a week, hour by hour, to see where your time goes.

title: Time Circles
description: Draw a pie chart for each day showing how you spent your time.

title: What On Earth Am I Doing?
description: A light-hearted questionnaire to check your lifestyle habits with reference to the environment, with a simple score.
